<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\Json; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/json.merge/ * * Merge a given JSON value into matching paths. * Consequently, JSON values at matching paths are updated, deleted, or expanded with new children. */ class JSONMERGE extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'JSON.MERGE'; } }
